settings.label: Classic Oil
settings.note: Rich shadows, deeper contrast, and a gallery-ready frame.

settings.label: Impressionist
settings.note: Loose brushwork that keeps the likeness and softens the moment.

settings.label: Modern Minimal
settings.note: Reduced forms, contemporary palette, and quiet confidence.

settings.label: Warm & Painterly
settings.note: Golden light, visible brush texture, and intimate atmosphere.

settings.label: Upload
settings.body: Start with one strong photo. The better the expression, the better the piece.

settings.label: Choose style
settings.body: Review the core painterly directions and react to the one that fits the memory best.

settings.label: Preview in room
settings.body: See the artwork against believable interiors so scale and mood are easier to judge.

settings.label: Frame it
settings.body: Pair the chosen direction with a frame that makes it feel resolved on the wall.

settings.label: Finish
settings.body: The final portrait is produced as a polished, gallery-ready object for the home.

settings.label: Pigment
settings.title: Color that feels alive up close
settings.body: We lean into tonal depth and brush-preserving print detail so the preview still feels tactile, not flat.

settings.label: Canvas
settings.title: Texture that keeps the piece from feeling digital
settings.body: Premium canvas gives the final portrait enough grain and softness to read like a studio finish.

settings.label: Frame
settings.title: Frames that complete the mood
settings.body: Warm woods and soft metallics make the portrait feel curated for a room, not merely delivered.

settings.label: Delivery
settings.title: Presentation that still feels ceremonial
settings.body: Protective packaging, gifting polish, and careful finishing keep the unboxing part of the story.

settings.title: Absolutely stunning.
settings.quote: "I was nervous ordering art online, but the AI preview feature gave me confidence. When the actual painting arrived, it was even better than the preview."
settings.name: Sarah Jenkins

settings.title: Worth every penny.
settings.quote: "The quality of the canvas and the antique frame are top-notch. You can see the actual brushstrokes. It feels like a true heirloom piece."
settings.name: James Mitchell

settings.title: A wonderful gift.
settings.quote: "We used the preview flow before ordering and it made the decision easy. The final framed portrait arrived feeling completely resolved."
settings.name: Emma Rodriguez

settings.title: The preview sold us.
settings.quote: "Seeing the portrait mocked up in a room made the choice feel obvious. It already looked like it belonged in our home."
settings.name: Noah Parker
